title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Oil WTI +4.4% (24h) → $73.52 · Brent +5.4% → $78.19. Day 2 of US-Iran conflict; Strait of Hormuz disrupted, inflation risk rising.
BTC -1.6% (below 3% threshold) · ETH -1.5% (below 4% threshold).
S&P 500 closed +0.81% on AI/chip rally after morning selloff — equities resilient.
